summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MVNO system. Backend APIs working perfectly (20/20 tests passed), but critical frontend Select component bug discovered that breaks UI navigation after form submissions.

critical_bugs.issue: SelectItem components cannot handle empty string values, causing runtime errors and UI breakdown
critical_bugs.error_message: A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string. This is because the Select value can be set to an empty string to clear the selection and show the placeholder.
critical_bugs.impact: Breaks entire UI navigation after form submissions, making the application unusable

ui_bugs.issue: After client creation form submission, navigation to other pages fails due to Select component errors
affected_selectors: Select components with empty string values

integration_issues.issue: Form submissions trigger Select component errors that break the entire UI

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select/SelectItem components to properly handle empty string values. The error occurs in all Select components across the application. Need to either: 1) Ensure SelectItem values are never empty strings, or 2) Update Select component logic to handle empty strings properly. This is blocking all UI functionality after form submissions.
